slash.ask.example.query: Ask a natural-language question and save the answer as a QA page.
slash.ask.summary: Answer from the workspace with sources.
slash.blame.example.range: Explain who changed the current document range.
slash.blame.summary: Show line ownership for the current document.
slash.cite.example.selection: Add citation suggestions for the selected passage.
slash.compare.example.docs: Compare two document revisions or pages.
slash.crosslink.example.doc: Suggest links for the current page.
slash.crosslink.summary: Suggest wiki links for the current page.
slash.curate.example.scope: Propose structure changes for a scope.
slash.curate.example.since: Diagnose recent pages against a threshold.
slash.diagram.example.doc: Create a diagram preview from the current page.
slash.diff.example.rev: Compare two revisions of a document.
slash.draft.example.empty: Create an outline and first draft for an empty page.
slash.draft.example.prompt: Draft from a prompt and audience hint.
slash.draft.summary: Start a draft or expand the selected passage.
slash.duplicates.example.scope: Find near-duplicate pages in a scope.
slash.find.example.literal: Search with literal mode and a result limit.
slash.grep.example.links: Find wiki links with a regular expression.
slash.grep.summary: Run a regex search across the workspace.
slash.improve.example.selection: Improve the selected text with three options.
slash.improve.example.tone: Improve selected text for executive tone.
slash.improve.summary: Rewrite selected prose with three alternatives.
slash.import.example.zip: Import a zip or folder into a target path.
slash.ingest.summary: Turn raw source material into wiki pages.
slash.outline.example.doc: Build an outline for the current page.
slash.revert.summary: Revert an import or agent run.
